name: Authentic Maryland Crab Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fresh oregano or 1 tsp. dried oregano
or a pinch of cayenne pepper -- to taste
2 cups fresh or frozen corn kernels
freshly ground black pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, cook the onions, garlic, green bell pepper, and celery in half a cup of the stock until softened, about 5-10 minutes.
2. Add the remaining stock, tomato sauce (or crushed tomatoes), bay leaf, oregano, red peppers, potatoes, and carrots to the pot. Cook for 20 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
3. Stir in the corn, crab meat, and parsley. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes. Season with freshly ground black pepper to taste before serving.
